scripts.db:push: sh -c 'if [ -x ../../apps/web/node_modules/.bin/prisma ]; then ../../apps/web/node_modules/.bin/prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma; elif [ -x ../../node_modules/.bin/prisma ]; then ../../node_modules/.bin/prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma; else prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma; fi'
scripts.prisma:generate: sh -c 'if [ -x ../../apps/web/node_modules/.bin/prisma ]; then ../../apps/web/node_modules/.bin/prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma; elif [ -x ../../node_modules/.bin/prisma ]; then ../../node_modules/.bin/prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma; else prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma; fi'
